clusters.justification: These terms map onto macroscopic salience and visceromotor networks, representing the overarching functional domain of processing physiological arousal, emotional reactivity, and stress responses.
This cluster reflects the functional computations of mesolimbic and striatal circuitry, centering on the assessment of subjective utility, incentive, and cost to drive motivated behavior.
These terms converge on the Default Mode Network, which supports high-level, internally constructed representational processes involving the self, other agents, and complex interpersonal dynamics.
